meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve Basic App Limits
content.seo_description: Break free from basic app limitations. Learn a professional client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-end SaaS projects faster.
content.answer_block: Stop building basic CRUD apps that fail to scale. By integrating Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you transform your workflow. This approach automates boilerplate, enforces production-ready patterns, and allows you to deliver complex, client-grade SaaS applications in half the time.
content.intro:
The screen flickers with yet another simple task management app—the kind that gets you paid, but never gets you hired for the high-ticket work. You're trapped in a cycle of basic features, manual debugging, and the suffocating feeling that you're just a glorified template filler. The ceiling for your freelance career isn't your coding skill; it's your delivery speed and architectural depth.

It’s time to stop writing boilerplate and start engineering solutions. By leveraging Antigravity to define your project backbone and Claude Code to execute complex logic, you shift from a 'builder' to an 'architect.' This is how you move past the basics and start shipping enterprise-grade software that keeps clients coming back.

steps.title: Architect the Core Schema
steps.description: Define your data models and relationships before writing code to ensure long-term scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust PostgreSQL schema and Prisma client definition for a multi-tenant SaaS platform including users, organizations, and subscription tiers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Initialize Prisma schema based on the generated architecture specs'

steps.title: Automate API Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate type-safe API endpoints that adhere to modern REST or GraphQL standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an Express/Next.js API route structure with middleware for authentication, rate limiting, and input validation using Zod.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Implement API boilerplate with Zod validation for all CRUD endpoints'

steps.title: Inject Business Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to iterate on specific service layers, ensuring logic is decoupled from the framework.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a clean service layer pattern that handles complex business logic for subscription billing calculations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Refactor service layer to separate billing logic from route controllers'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent UI Components
steps.description: Bridge the gap between your backend and frontend with reusable, state-aware components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a set of React components using Tailwind CSS and Radix UI primitives for a professional dashboard layout.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Build dashboard components and link them to the API endpoints created in step 2'

steps.title: Hardened Security & Testing
steps.description: Automate the generation of unit tests and security audits to ensure your client's project is production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Vitest suite covering edge cases for authentication flows and data persistence.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Run security audit and execute generated test suite to verify system integrity'

pro_tips: Always define your 'Context Window' in Claude Code with a system prompt that mandates clean code principles like DRY and SOLID.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation alongside your code; clients pay double for well-documented projects.
Map your project's environmental variables early to avoid 'it works on my machine' syndrome during client handoffs.
Leverage Claude Code's ability to read your entire codebase; use it to identify 'debt' before it becomes a blocking issue.
Create a 'template repository' of your best Antigravity outputs to reduce project startup time to under 10 minutes.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, deploy your boilerplate to a staging environment using Vercel or Railway. Document the API endpoints using Swagger/OpenAPI to provide your client with a professional 'Developer Portal' experience.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical edge to transform your freelance business from a task-based grind into a high-value software agency. Stop waiting for the perfect project and start creating the standard that others will follow. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
